author: LewisWJackson

strategy.name: Van de Pop + Tone Vase Hybrid
strategy.description: Weekly swing trading setup combining Van de Pop buy zones with Tone Vase MACD confirmation. Buy dips into key zones when momentum is still bullish.

bullish: Price pulls back into buy zone (near EMA 21 or EMA 50 support)
RSI between 35 and 58 (oversold but not capitulation)
MACD still bullish (histogram positive or crossing up)
Price above the 200 EMA on the weekly
bearish: RSI above 70 or falling from overbought
MACD histogram turning negative / bearish crossover
neutral: Price chopping between EMAs with no clear direction
MACD flat or near zero line

long: Price dips into Van de Pop buy zone
Weekly close above EMA 21 or EMA 50 confirms entry
short: Not primary strategy — Lewis focuses on buying dips, not shorting

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
Buy the dip — accumulate on pullbacks, don't chase
No emotional entries — if the setup isn't there, wait
Strategy is automated — trust the rules, remove emotion
Maximum positions across watchlist, don't overconcentrate
notes: Lewis's approach: weekly swing trading crypto, buying dips into key zones with RSI + MACD confirmation. Based on Van de Pop (buy zones, RSI ranges) and Tone Vase (MACD structure). The Pine script should flag buy zones where price pulls back with RSI 35-58 and MACD still bullish. Morning brief should scan all watchlist assets and report which are in/near buy zones.
